heading: Payments into reclamation fund of moneys received from entrymen and water right applicants
label: 392 Payments into reclamation fund of moneys received from entrymen and water right applicants
text: All moneys received from entrymen or applicants for water rights shall be paid into the reclamation fund.
notes: CodificationSection is comprised of fourth sentence of section 5 of act . First, second and fifth sentences of such section 5 were classified to sections 439, 431 and 381 of this title, respectively; part of third sentence was classified to .June 17, 1902section 476 of this title
Section as Unaffected by Submerged Lands ActProvisions of this section as not amended, modified or repealed by the Submerged Lands Act, see .section 1303 of this title
amendments: Section as Unaffected by Submerged Lands ActProvisions of this section as not amended, modified or repealed by the Submerged Lands Act, see .section 1303 of this title
